description: Patched per-role draft. Same shape as draft — every surviving action verbatim, every fixed action with extended prose, every new action from missing corrections.

actions.description: The new draft — full ordered list of action entries.

id.description: Same id for surviving / fixed actions; new <task_id>.<role_tag>.<n> continuing per-task numbering for actions added per a `missing` correction.

action.description: Imperative prose describing the concrete change.

verify.description: Observable assertions, one per line. Surviving actions keep their existing verify verbatim unless a correction touches it. Omit entirely for non-runnable artifacts.

rules.description: Rule proposals raised during this patch. Use sparingly.

examples.title: Patched per-role draft after round 1 corrections

actions.action: Add the responsive page shell to index.html: meta viewport, full-viewport flex container, centred .canvas div via min(80vw, 80vh).
actions.verify: Loading index.html shows a centred .canvas sized via min(80vw, 80vh).

actions.action: Implement the atmospheric layer in index.html <style>: a .sun block plus three .cloud elements with @keyframes drift. Add will-change: transform on .cloud (per the round-1 fix correction).
actions.verify:
Sun and clouds render inside .canvas without console errors.
Cloud .drift runs smoothly (no jank).

actions.action: Add a prefers-reduced-motion: reduce media query in <style> that disables every keyframe (per the round-1 missing correction).
actions.verify: Toggling the reduced-motion preference freezes every keyframe.
